summary: NIST's online engineering-statistics handbook. Section 6.3.2.4 defines the EWMA control chart, its variance factor lambda/(2-lambda)*(1-(1-lambda)^(2i)), and publishes a complete worked example -- a 20-point dataset with target 50, lambda 0.3 and the resulting EWMA series and control limits -- that implementations can reproduce value-for-value.
title: NIST/SEMATECH e-Handbook of Statistical Methods
